Class CheckPointGroups

java.lang.Object
track.CheckPointGroups
public class CheckPointGroups extends Object
CheckPointGroups.java Code Description: Groups connected checkpoint tiles by scanning for zones and mapping every tile in each zone to a checkpoint group number.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CheckPointGroups(int rows, int cols, int numCheckpoints, Track track)
    Constructor

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    changeGroupColor(int xPos, int yPos)
    Changes the color of all Tiles in the same checkpoint group as xPos yPos by setting hitCheckpoint to true
    void
    createGroups()
    Scans the track, the first checkpoint tile of each group is used to create a zone, and every checkpoint tile in that zone gets assigned the current group number.
    int
    getGroupNumber(int xPos, int yPos)
    Returns the group number of the checkpoint tile at xPos yPos, or -1 if the Tile is not a mapped checkpoint
    void
    resetAllGroups()
    Resets all checkpoint tiles in all groups back to unhit.
    void
    resetSpecificGroup(int groupNum)
    Resets the checkpoint tiles in a specific group

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • CheckPointGroups

      public CheckPointGroups(int rows, int cols, int numCheckpoints, Track track)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      rows - the number of rows in the track
      cols - the number of columns in the track
      numCheckpoints - the expected number of checkpoint groups
      track - the Track to scan

  • Method Details

    • createGroups

      public void createGroups()
      Scans the track, the first checkpoint tile of each group is used to create a zone, and every checkpoint tile in that zone gets assigned the current group number.

    • changeGroupColor

      public void changeGroupColor(int xPos, int yPos)
      Changes the color of all Tiles in the same checkpoint group as xPos yPos by setting hitCheckpoint to true
      Parameters:
      xPos - column of hit checkpoint
      yPos - row of hit checkpoint

    • getGroupNumber

      public int getGroupNumber(int xPos, int yPos)
      Returns the group number of the checkpoint tile at xPos yPos, or -1 if the Tile is not a mapped checkpoint
      Parameters:
      xPos - column of the tile
      yPos - row of the tile
      Returns:
      group number of the tile, or -1 if not mapped

    • resetAllGroups

      public void resetAllGroups()
      Resets all checkpoint tiles in all groups back to unhit. Called when Finish line is hit.

    • resetSpecificGroup

      public void resetSpecificGroup(int groupNum)
      Resets the checkpoint tiles in a specific group
      Parameters:
      groupNum - the corresponding group to be reset
